examples: Eighth seed Agnieszka Radwanska , a quarterfinalist in 2011, came from behind to eliminate American Bethanie Mattek-Sands.
Oudin, a former U.S. Open quarterfinalist, won only 19 of 51 points on her serve and held just once.
The two-time quarterfinalist will face Russian 27th seed Mikhail Youzhny in round three.
